title: Limited Damage Indicator Particle
description: A lightweight mod that controls the number of damage indicator particles rendered.
body:
A lightweight mod that controls the number of damage indicator particles rendered.

Is the damage and monster health too high, causing frame drops or particles blocking vision?

In extreme cases, it even causes freezes and crashes?

Don't want to simply turn off all damage particles?

---

This mod may help you.

This mod can configure the generation multiplier and upper limit of damage indicator particles generated by player attack actions (it can also generate more, but this is not the main purpose).

This mod also turns off the rendering of low-damage indicator particles by default (it can also be turned back on).
![ldip1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6e2d7e2c0f9b7aec1bc9d0499f195327554e037.png)
